title: API : add boards into dashboard
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is it possible using the monday API to add boards into a dashboard like the webapp (image). 
I see nothing about dashboards in the api doc. 
Thanks.

posts.author: ach (Alexandre Chiu)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ach and welcome to the community

I hope you like it here!

This is not something that is supported by our API as of today.

Let us know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
